svg.title: Gig → Proposal → Contract → Payment flow
svg.desc: End-to-end flow from gig creation through proposals, role acceptance, contract issuance, and payment options

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Gig model and its status flow')
sendPrompt('How does gig publishing work and what triggers provider visibility?')
sendPrompt('How do proposal roles link to GigRole for structured gigs?')
sendPrompt('How do proposals work for open gigs without structured roles?')
sendPrompt('What does a full Proposal object look like with roles and deliverables?')
sendPrompt('How does per-role accept/reject work independently within a proposal?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a proposal role is rejected?')
sendPrompt('What triggers when a proposal role is accepted?')
sendPrompt('How should I design the contracts app and what data should a Contract model hold?')
sendPrompt('How does the payment decision screen work after contract issuance?')
sendPrompt('How does Pay and Release work — what does it trigger in the Payment model?')
sendPrompt('How does Pay and Hold work with deliverables as release triggers?')
sendPrompt('What is the setup fee payment flow and when is it used?')
sendPrompt('How should the smart_release app work to auto-release held funds when deliverables complete?')
sendPrompt('How does the Payment model record and track all three payment types?')
